CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter a value between 0.1 and 10 that represents a percentage of the regular travel time. Applies only if you're using the light truck or heavy truck travel modes. For example, a factor of 1.0 means 100% of the regular travel time (default), a factor of 1.2 means travel time is slower by 20%, and a factor of 0.9 means travel time is faster by 10%.
